h1: Custom Outerwear for Work, Safety, and Brand Visibility
metaDescription: Shop custom outerwear for marketing, safety, and teams. Jackets, vests, ponchos with logo printing. Perfect Imprints has you covered.
introHtml:
Marketing directors, HR directors, safety managers, and business owners all face the same challenge: finding outerwear that gets worn. Whether you need branded jackets for a product launch, high-visibility vests for a safety program, or durable ponchos for outdoor events, the right custom outerwear keeps your brand front and center while serving a real purpose.

Our catalog includes performance shells like the Boundary Fleece Jacket, rugged workwear such as the Carhartt® Duck Vest, and waterproof options like the Rains® Jacket and Shed Rain™ Poncho. Many styles come in men’s and women’s cuts, plus youth sizes. Decoration options include screen print, embroidery, and full-color print, so you can match your logo to any fabric. Minimum order quantities vary by product, but we can accommodate small teams or large fleets.

When you order from Perfect Imprints, you get a dedicated account manager, free artwork proofs, and competitive pricing on bulk orders. Samples are available before production, and lead times typically run 10–15 business days after approval. Let us help you choose the right outerwear for your group.

faqs.q: What are the minimum order quantities for custom outerwear?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by product. Many vests and ponchos require as few as 12 pieces, while jackets may start at 24 or 48. Contact your account manager for specific MOQs on your chosen style.

faqs.q: What decoration methods work best for outerwear?
faqs.a: Screen print works well for flat surfaces like vest backs, while embroidery is ideal for chest logos on jackets. Full-color print is available for waterproof materials like those used in the Rains® Jacket. We'll recommend the best method for your design and fabric.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer sample orders for most outerwear styles. You can request a blank sample or one with your logo. Sample pricing and lead times vary; ask your account manager for details.

faqs.q: What is the typical production lead time?
faqs.a: After art approval, production usually takes 10 to 15 business days. Complex decorations or large orders may require additional time. Rush orders are available on select items.

faqs.q: Do you offer outerwear in women's and youth sizes?
faqs.a: Yes, many styles like the Women's Mesa Vest and Youth Performer Jacket are available. We also carry unisex options. Check product pages for size ranges, and we can help you order mixed sizes for your group.

heroAltText: Group photo of people wearing custom outerwear including branded vests and jackets for work and events
